title: Could Shinji have prevented Asukas death
display_title: Could Shinji have prevented Asukas death
wikitext:
[]: Could Shinji have prevented Asuka's death?             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Fri Feb 20, 2009 8:28 pm Do you think that, had Shinji gotten into Eva-01, he could have helped Asuka fight off the MP Eva series? I think that if he kept his power cable well protected, he could have had the chance to held them off indefinitely.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Feb 20, 2009 8:47 pm S2 ENGINE!!! Also, I'm quite sure this has been discussed many times before.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Feb 20, 2009 9:13 pm lol, Eva ANIMA

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Feb 20, 2009 9:49 pm It's a very complex question... Is it possible for Shinji to reach the plug earlier, either by preceding the bakalite, finding an alternate route, somehow breaking through it, or awakening 01 before it's too late? Even if he does, will Yui allow him change the course of events? Is it even possible to keep the MPE's down by destroying cores, plugs, massive damage or ass-pull ATF magic? Can Shinji pull himself together enough to pilot effectively, and inflict the kind of damage that might be necessary (especially if it requires targeting plugs or destroying JSSDF units)? Will Asuka even let him help, and if so will they be able to work together or will bickering make them even less effective than if Asuka was on her own? Will the MPEs present a more challenging opposition rather than just playing with Asuka until her power runs dry, such as actually making use of their flight ability, sheer numbers, and superior armament? If so, can two evas manage to defeat nine serious opponents? Is it possible to defeat them before Asuka's power runs out? If not, is there a spare cable nearby? If that's a no, can she force it to activate anyway in berzerker mode (and will this be controllable or will Shinji have to fight it?) If that one is a no too, can Shinji finish the job on his own? Will Rei still betray Gendo and prevent his version of 3rd impact without Shinji's epic scream? If so, can her version of 3rd impact be stopped? If not, what effect does his version have on everyone else? Will the original lance show up out of nowhere to make the whole thing moot anyway? Does winning this battle and avoiding setting off an impact mean it's all over, or will Seele just try again next week?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 21, 2009 4:04 am NemZ wrote: Even if he does, will Yui allow him change the course of events? Will the original lance show up out of nowhere to make the whole thing moot anyway?

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat Feb 21, 2009 9:06 am This smells of Re-take. I think the plan was against them, at any rate. Speaking of other plans, instrumentality had to happen, so GAINAX wouldn't have created so many openings for success (and there aren't any). So, (plus the comments of those before me) there was no way that they would have won, especially with the MP Evas regenerative abilities.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat Feb 21, 2009 10:32 am In one word, No: at this point Shinji couldn't’t have used shogouki much less save Asuka or NERV. Shinji had no influence over anything but himself (and even that was tenuous), the only one who could have changed the outcome was Yui and she wasn't willing. This certainly is in keeping with Evangelion's Greek tragedy element and the concept of inevitability.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat Feb 21, 2009 1:49 pm Yes.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Sat Feb 21, 2009 8:08 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: Yes.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sat Feb 21, 2009 10:52 pm Do the EVAs have an "eject" option? Asuka could just eject and have 02 go berserk.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Sun Feb 22, 2009 1:02 am Do the EVAs have an "eject" option? Asuka could just eject and have 02 go berserk.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sun Feb 22, 2009 2:48 am Formless One wrote: They do, but we've only ever seen it triggered by the ground crew, since after all, the Eva is usually the safest place for the pilot to be, thanks to the AT field. Furthermore, I doubt the Eva can go berserk without its pilot inside. Isn't Berserk a function of the mothers protective instincts and the synch rate?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Feb 22, 2009 2:53 am If he did would save her then I think things would have been same for the rest in the movie. If he fight against the Mass Eva's then he would win up beating them better then Unit 02 did.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sun Feb 22, 2009 8:55 pm No sarcasm. If he wanted to he could've done something. He could've at least tried to do something.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sun Feb 22, 2009 9:36 pm As I recall in SRW Alpha, saving Asuka was less an option and more a challenge. If it was slightly difficult using a couple of overpowered super robots, then I doubt Shinji could have done much. Plus, despite all his win count, Asuka was clearly the better at fighting in an Eva unit. If she could barely pull it off, it's doubtful Shinji could.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Feb 22, 2009 9:59 pm Asuka was clearly the better at fighting in an Eva unit.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sun Feb 22, 2009 10:07 pm Well once Asuka realized that her mother was in Eva-02 she became a little less crazy.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 22, 2009 11:54 pm Oedipusfoot wrote: This smells of Re-take.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Feb 23, 2009 12:35 am @Topic: No. LeoXiao wrote: Well the eva isn't so safe if it's running out of power and everybody in SEELE knows you're inside, right? I guess there may not be an option for the pilot to eject by himself though.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 23, 2009 1:01 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: Well once Asuka realized that her mother was in Eva-02 she became a little less crazy.
